issue: exported component with no permission protection

details.reason: Exported activity 'com.panasonic.pavc.viera.activity.LogoActivity' requires no permission — any third-party app can invoke it directly.

Activity 'com.panasonic.pavc.viera.activity.TabBaseActivity' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

issue: exported component handles sensitive intent actions

details.reason: Activity 'com.panasonic.pavc.viera.activity.TabBaseActivity' is reachable from other apps and handles sensitive system intent actions. Verify that all incoming Intent data is validated before use.
